//authors: Allowed authors (whose PRs we may approve) live in the DuckDB store, per repo. Manage with: agent-code-review authors allow <owner/repo|*> <github-handle> [--name ... --email ... --slack-id ...]

review.main_prompt: Act as a friendly PR unblocker. Review this pull request using the pr-issue-review skill and let the skill choose its own review profile. Complete every action the skill asks for (tmp workspace, GitHub review/comments). You have access to gh, agent-slack, and a tmp workspace.
review.//rules_note: Comment-only vs approval is a built-in, always-present directive (default: comment-only; approval only when the author is on the allowed-authors list for this repo and it isn't self-authored) — you do not need a rule for it. Rules add EXTRA instructions when their condition matches.

rules.name: slack-on-approve
rules.prompt: If (and only if) you APPROVE, check the configured Slack review channels for a recent message about this PR and react/reply per the team convention: react with :git-approved: and :lizard: when the message covers only this PR (or all its PRs are now approved/merged); otherwise reply in-thread with the PR number, a :lizard: prefix and a :git-approved: suffix. Run agent-slack outside the sandbox so it can load credentials.

codex.//args_note: workspace-write disables network by default, but the agent must reach GitHub (gh) and Slack — this override re-enables network while keeping writes scoped to the per-PR workdir.
